caption: A man with a shaved head, beard, and tattoos on his right arm is seated in a studio with dark gray acoustic foam walls. He wears a white t-shirt and black over-ear headphones. A professional microphone on a boom arm is positioned in front of him, with the text "RodeProcaster" visible on the mounting bracket. The man is speaking while gesturing with his right hand. In the first frame, he begins to raise his hand toward his face. By the second frame, his hand has moved out of the shot, and he continues speaking with an open mouth. In the third frame, he brings his right hand back across his face in a sweeping motion. In the final frame, his hand is raised high and blurred, indicating movement, as he continues to talk.
